<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/planningUnit/productCategoryList/active/realmCountryId/{realmCountryId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of active planning units for a list of product categories

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the realm country to retrieve planning units for","in":"path","name":"realmCountryId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}},"required":true}}

  id={undefined}
